# Swoop Club Intelligence — Comprehensive Development Plan

## 1. Executive Summary

Swoop Club Intelligence has built an exceptionally strong B2B marketing foundation. The narrative copy, industry-specific empathy, and aggressive risk reversal effectively disarm a notoriously skeptical buyer persona (Club GMs). However, catastrophic mobile layout failures and critical conversion-path leaks are currently stranding high-intent buyers. 

This development plan synthesizes the UI, UX, and technical critique reports into a prioritized, actionable roadmap for our cross-functional team. 

**The highest-leverage priorities are:**
1. **Fixing Mobile Grid Squeezing:** Desktop 2-column and 4-column layouts currently compress on 390px screens, completely destroying legibility. Fixing this alone is projected to salvage **+$36k/mo** in lost pipeline.
2. **Plugging the CTA Leaks:** Expectation mismatches (e.g., the $1,499 tier sending users backwards to "See Full Platform" instead of booking) and un-gated ROI tools are bleeding ready-to-act leads. 
3. **Core Web Vitals & Trust Alignment:** Resolving LCP font-blocking, CLS image jumping, and sloppy trust artifacts (a 2026 copyright date) will align the site’s technical performance with its premium "Zero IT Lift" brand promise.

---

## 2. "Do Not Break" — Positive Patterns to Preserve

Before beginning execution, the team must protect the following high-performing assets:
*   **Hyper-Specific Industry Empathy:** Retain exact phrasing like "Legacy Jonas servers," "Tee sheet leakage," and "Twilight gaps." This peer-level vocabulary is driving our 94/100 Storyteller scores.
*   **Radical Risk Reversal:** Do not remove or dilute microcopy around "Zero IT Lift," "Mutual NDA," "AES-256," or "Data deleted in 30 days." These are systematically destroying enterprise sales objections.
*   **Premium Brand Discipline:** Strict adherence to the 60/30/10 palette (Charcoal, Cream, Orange) and 3-font system (Fraunces, Plus Jakarta, JetBrains Mono) must be maintained to avoid the "generic SaaS" aesthetic.

---

## 3. Success Metrics

| Timeline | Focus Area | Measurable KPIs |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Sprint 1** | Quick Wins (Conversion & Trust) | Lead Form CVR (+5%), Reduction in pricing confusion queries. |
| **Sprint 2** | High-Impact (Mobile & UX) | Mobile Bounce Rate (decrease by >15%), Mobile Demo Requests. |
| **Sprint 3** | Structural (Performance & Viz) | LCP < 1.2s, CLS < 0.1, INP < 200ms (Pass Core Web Vitals). |
| **Backlog** | Strategic Enhancements | Scroll depth on long pages, Asset payload sizes. |

---

## 4. Prioritised Backlog

### Sprint 1 – Quick Wins (< 1 day each, ship within the week)
*These are predominantly HTML/CSS/Copy changes that resolve immediate trust blockers and conversion leaks.*

#### [1.1] Add Missing Pricing CTAs & Apply Brand Font
* **Description:** Add action buttons to the $0 and $1,499 tiers and enforce JetBrains Mono for prices.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end / Marketing
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo
* **Evidence:** Closer, Brand Guardian, Skeptic, Storyteller
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** No CTA under Free/Enterprise. Prices use `font-sans`.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* $0 Tier Update */}
  <h3 className="text-4xl font-mono text-gray-900">$0/mo</h3>
  <p className="mt-4 text-gray-600">Total Visibility. We monitor your systems 24/7 and deliver a daily digest of at-risk members, unlogged complaints, and sudden demand spikes.</p>
  <button className="w-full mt-8 bg-white border-2 border-orange-500 text-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-50 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-colors">
    Start Data Audit
  </button>
  
  {/* $499 Tier Font Fix */}
  <h3 className="text-4xl font-mono text-gray-900">$499/mo</h3>
  
  {/* $1,499 Tier Update */}
  <h3 className="text-4xl font-mono text-gray-900">$1,499/mo</h3>
  {/* ... existing description ... */}
  <button className="w-full mt-8 bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-colors">
    Book a Walkthrough
  </button>
  ```

#### [1.2] Standardize CTAs & Fix Ghost Button
* **Description:** Upgrade ghost button to primary solid style and standardize verbiage/arrows.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/MemberExperienceSection.jsx` & `IntegrationsSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end / Design
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo (aggregated pipeline lift)
* **Evidence:** Closer, Brand Guardian
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<button className="border border-gray-800...">Book a Walkthrough</button>` and `<button>Test Swoop on your data →</button>`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // In MemberExperienceSection.jsx - Upgrade to primary
  <button className="bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md hover:bg-orange-600 transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2">
    Book a Walkthrough
  </button>
  
  // In IntegrationsSection.jsx - Standardize Language
  <button className="bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md hover:bg-orange-600 transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2">
    Book a Walkthrough
  </button>
  ```

#### [1.3] Fix Dark Mode Contrast & Kicker Legibility
* **Description:** Lighten dark grey text on charcoal backgrounds to pass WCAG AA.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/HeroSection.jsx` & `ProblemSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Design / Front-end
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Usability / Accessibility Pass
* **Evidence:** Architect
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<p className="text-gray-400 text-lg">` and `<span className="text-[10px] text-brass uppercase">`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // Hero body copy (lighten text)
  <p className="text-gray-200 text-lg max-w-2xl mx-auto">
    Most software tells you what happened. Swoop tells you what to do next.
  </p>
  
  // Kickers in all dark sections (increase size and brightness)
  <span className="text-xs tracking-widest text-[#D4AF37] font-semibold uppercase mb-2 block">
    See It
  </span>
  ```

  ```jsx
  // In IntegrationsSection.jsx

    See how a member's dining habits predict their tee times, or how a staffing shortage in the Grill Room impacts pro shop revenue.
  </p>
  
  // Rollout Text in IntegrationsSection.jsx
  <p className="text-gray-300">
    Week 1: We connect your systems and let Swoop learn your club's rhythms. Week 2: We configure your custom alerts and hand you the keys. Zero IT headaches.
  </p>
  ```


#### [1.6] Add Anti-Anxiety Microcopy & Security Reassurance
* **Description:** Explicitly mention data privacy above the fold and below demo CTAs.

* **Owner:** Copy / Marketing
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Trust / Bounce Rate
* **Evidence:** Skeptic, GM, Closer

  ```jsx
    No credit card · NO IT lift · Live in 2 weeks · <span className="text-white">Zero member data sold or shared.</span>
  </p>
  
  // In DemoCtaSection.jsx (Below final Book button)
  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-4">
    No high-pressure sales. Just a 30-minute look at how Swoop maps to your exact club data.
  </p>
  ```

#### [1.10] Ground the "Prove It" Story Visually
* **Description:** Stylize the Karen Wittman vignette so it reads as a true case study, not standard body copy.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/SeeItFixItProveItSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end / Design
* **Effort:** < 30 mins
* **Impact:** Conviction / Trust
* **Evidence:** Skeptic, Closer
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Standard `<p>` tags beneath the dummy metrics.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Wrap in a stylized testimonial/case-study block to increase authority */}
  <div className="mt-6 p-6 bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-200 shadow-sm relative">
    <div className="absolute -left-3 top-6 text-4xl text-[#F3922D] font-serif opacity-30">"</div>
    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 relative z-10">
      CRM said active POS: last 10 days. Tee sheet: no-show three Wednesdays. <strong className="text-slate-900 font-semibold">Not one system flagged her.</strong> Together they did. A comp dinner went out Tuesday. Karen renewed in November.
    </p>
    <p className="text-xs font-mono font-semibold text-slate-500 mt-4 uppercase tracking-wider">
      — Case Snapshot: Karen Wittman, 9-Year Member
    </p>
  </div>
  ```

#### [1.12] Standardize CTA Funnel & Stop Lead Leakage
* **Description:** Change $1,499 tier CTA to book a call rather than viewing the platform.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end / Marketing
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo
* **Evidence:** Closer, Brand Guardian
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** 
  * $0 Tier CTA: `<button>Get Free Daily Alerts</button>`
  * $1499 Tier CTA: `<button>See the Full Platform →</button>`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // $0 Tier (Secondary outline style)
  <button className="w-full py-3 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-md font-medium text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
    Book a Setup Call →
  </button>
  
  // $499 Tier (Primary solid style)
  <button className="w-full py-3 px-4 bg-orange-500 rounded-md font-bold text-[#1B1814] hover:bg-orange-400 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
    Book a 30-min Walkthrough →
  </button>
  
  // $1499 Tier (Secondary outline style)
  <button className="w-full py-3 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-md font-medium text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
    Book a Premium Walkthrough →
  </button>
  ```

#### [1.13] Clarify the Pricing Tier Deliverables
* **Description:** Add clarifying microcopy to answer how alerts arrive (email vs app) and alleviate "tech replacement" fears.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Copy
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Comprehension
* **Evidence:** GM, First-Timer, Skeptic

  ```jsx
  // $0 Tier Additions (in the feature list)

    <CheckIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 shrink-0" />
    <span>Daily member health scores <strong>(via email digest)</strong></span>
  </li>
  
  // $499 Tier Copy Update (replacing "so your team acts instead...")

    Everything in Signals, plus Swoop drafts the exact callback scripts and comp offers needed to save the member. <strong>Stop sorting spreadsheets; start saving dues.</strong>
  </p>
  
  // $1,499 Tier Clarification (in the feature list)
  <li className="flex gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
    <CheckIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 shrink-0" />
    <span>Swoop member app included <strong>(integrates with existing club apps)</strong></span>
  </li>
  ```

#### [1.14] Fix Mobile UX & Tap Targets in FAQ
* **Description:** Ensure FAQ rows have 44px min-height tap targets and open the first item by default.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/FaqSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Usability
* **Evidence:** Mobile Inspector, Closer
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Custom React state with padding only on the icon or text.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Use native details/summary or ensure full-width block tap targets */}
  <details className="group border-b border-gray-200" open={isFirstItem}>
    <summary className="flex justify-between items-center font-medium cursor-pointer list-none py-5 px-2 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
      <span className="text-gray-900 text-base md:text-lg pr-4">Do I need to replace my current software?</span>
      <span className="transition group-open:rotate-45">
        <PlusIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600 shrink-0" />
      </span>
    </summary>
    <div className="text-gray-600 text-sm md:text-base pb-6 px-2 animate-fadeIn">
      No. Swoop sits on top of your existing systems and connects via API. We support 28 integrations across 10 categories.
    </div>
  </details>
  ```

  ```jsx
    </div>
    <div>
      <p className="text-xl font-serif text-gray-900 font-medium mb-2">
        "Swoop flagged a member we were about to lose. One dinner comp and a follow-up call saved $18K in annual dues."
      </p>
      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">— Robert Torres, GM · Meridian Hills CC</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

#### [1.24] Fix Mobile Stats Stacking
* **Description:** Force a 2x2 grid on mobile for "Intelligence in action" cards to prevent infinite scroll.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/SocialProofSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** UX
* **Evidence:** Architect, Mobile Inspector
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Force 2x2 grid on mobile, 4-col on desktop */}
  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-8">
  ```

#### [1.25] Amplify Scarcity & Affordances
* **Description:** Increase visual punch of scarcity cues and add underlines to inline text links globally.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Conversion
* **Evidence:** Closer, Architect
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Small gray text for scarcity. Standalone orange text for links.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // 1. Scarcity amplification
  <p className="text-orange-600 font-bold mb-4">🔥 Only 3 of 10 founding-partner spots remaining.</p>
  
  // 2. Link Affordances (Global CSS or inline tailwind)
  <a href="..." className="text-orange-500 font-medium underline underline-offset-4 decoration-orange-200 hover:decoration-orange-500 transition-colors">
    See how the platform works →
  </a>
  ```

#### [1.26] Unify the "30-Minute" Promise & Remove Presumptive Copy
* **Description:** Standardise Contact page copy that jumps erratically between a 15-minute output and 30-minute walkthrough.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx` (Contact Page context)
* **Owner:** Copy
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Trust / Clarity
* **Evidence:** Skeptic, Storyteller, GM
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `See what Swoop would find at your club — in 15 minutes.`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif text-white mb-6">
    See what Swoop can uncover in your tee sheet — in exactly 30 minutes.
  </h2>
  ```

#### [1.27] Fix Form CTA "Bait-and-Switch"
* **Description:** Change Contact form button from "Get Custom Plan" to "Request Walkthrough" to set correct expectations.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Copy / Marketing
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo
* **Evidence:** Closer (Contact)
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-400 to-orange-500 ...">Get My Custom Retention Plan</button>`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <button className="w-full bg-[#F3922D] hover:bg-[#D97D22] text-[#1B1814] font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded transition-colors duration-200 mt-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#F3922D] focus:ring-offset-[#1B1814]">
    Request My 30-Minute Walkthrough &rarr;
  </button>
  ```

#### [1.28] Resolve WCAG Contrast & iOS Zoom Failures
* **Description:** Enforce minimum 16px text size on form inputs to stop iOS zooming, and lighten hero subtext.
* **File:** `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx` & `DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Accessibility / UX
* **Evidence:** Architect, Mobile Inspector
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Subtext uses light grey (fails WCAG). Form inputs lack explicit 16px.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Hero Subtext (ContactPage.jsx) */}
  <p className="text-sm text-[#595959] mt-3">Free &middot; No credit card &middot; No IT lift</p>
  
  {/* Form Inputs (DemoCtaSection.jsx) - Force text-base (16px) */}
  <input type="text" className="... text-base text-white ..." />
  ```

#### [1.29] Elevate "Zero IT" Under Form & Fix Addresses
* **Description:** Reassure users regarding "Zero IT lift" directly below the form and add a physical address to the footer.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Copy
* **Effort:** < 1 hr
* **Impact:** Trust
* **Evidence:** Skeptic, GM
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Trust text directly under the form / badges */}
  <div className="mt-6 text-center text-[13px] text-gray-400 font-medium">
    Zero IT required &middot; Mutual NDA included &middot; Cancel anytime
  </div>
  ```

### Sprint 2 – High-Impact Fixes (1-5 days each, ship within the sprint)

#### [2.1] Fix Mobile Layout Collapse (Feature Blocks)
* **Description:** Force the Home "SEE IT / FIX IT" grids to stack vertically (`flex-col`) on mobile to stop illegible squeezing.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/ProblemSection.jsx` & `LandingFooter.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** +$36k/mo (from Mobile Inspector impact rating)
* **Evidence:** Mobile Inspector
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<div className="flex gap-8 ...">`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // In ProblemSection.jsx (Apply to the container holding text/image pairs)
  <div className="flex flex-col-reverse md:flex-row gap-8 md:gap-16 items-center ...">
  
  // In LandingFooter.jsx (Bottom link row)
  <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 sm:gap-6 text-sm items-center justify-center sm:justify-start">
  ```

#### [2.2] Make "See a sample brief" a Functional Modal
* **Description:** Convert secondary text link into a functional ghost button that triggers an email capture modal.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/HeroSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end / Marketing
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Pipeline generation
* **Evidence:** Closer, GM
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<a href="#" className="text-white hover:text-orange-500">See a sample brief</a>`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <button 
    onClick={() => setIsSampleModalOpen(true)} 
    className="border-2 border-gray-400 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/10 font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-colors inline-flex items-center gap-2"
  >
    See a sample brief
  </button>
  ```

#### [2.3] Stack "Fix It / Prove It" and Fix Illegible Micro-Copy
* **Description:** Reconfigure Platform page UI/Text pairs to stack on mobile, clamping text size.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/SeeItFixItProveItSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Mobile Legibility
* **Evidence:** Mobile Inspector, Architect
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Desktop-first grid/flex row wrapping both the UI mockup (left) and text (right).
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // Change outer container to stack on mobile, side-by-side on md+
  <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8 lg:gap-16 items-start">
    {/* Left Column: UI Mockup */}
    <div className="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex justify-center">
       {/* Inside the mockup card: enforce minimum text size for mobile */}
       <div className="text-[15px] md:text-sm italic text-slate-300">
          "Mark — it's been a rough month. I'd like to personally comp two guest passes..."
       </div>
    </div>
    {/* Right Column: Text List */}
    <div className="w-full lg:w-1/2 mt-8 lg:mt-0">
       {/* ... text content ... */}
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.4] Fix CLS via Explicit Image Dimensions & Lazy Loading
* **Description:** Hardcode width/height attributes on intricate dark-mode dashboard mockups to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/HowItWorksSection.jsx` & `AgentsLiveDemo.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Core Web Vitals pass (SEO)
* **Evidence:** Speedster
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<img src="/assets/daily-brief-mockup.png" alt="..." className="w-full" />`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Add width, height, and loading attributes to ALL below-the-fold mockups */}
  <img 
    src="/assets/daily-brief-mockup.webp" 
    alt="Swoop Daily Brief Dashboard showing Mark Henderson" 
    width="800" 
    height="600" 
    loading="lazy" 
    decoding="async"
    className="w-full h-auto aspect-[4/3] object-cover rounded-xl shadow-2xl" 
  />
  ```

#### [2.5] Anchor Platform Hero Visually
* **Description:** Add an abstract UI card below the primary CTA to instantly signal "software".
* **File:** `src/landing/pages/PlatformPage.jsx`
* **Owner:** Design / Front-end
* **Effort:** 1-2 days
* **Impact:** UI Cohesion
* **Evidence:** Architect, Closer
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* ADD VISUAL ANCHOR BELOW CTA */}
  <div className="mt-16 w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto relative px-4">
    <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-stone-50 z-10 bottom-0 h-32"></div>
    <img 
      src="/assets/hero-dashboard-abstract.webp" 
      alt="Swoop Intelligence Dashboard Preview" 
      width="1200"
      height="600"
      className="w-full rounded-t-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200" 
      fetchPriority="high" // Eager load LCP visual
    />
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.6] Sticky CTA on Platform Sub-Nav
* **Description:** Ensure the secondary navigation bar stays sticky and holds a conversion button for long scrolls.
* **File:** `src/landing/pages/PlatformPage.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Conversion
* **Evidence:** Closer, Mobile Inspector
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <div className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-stone-50/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-200">
    <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 flex items-center justify-between">
      {/* Add right fade gradient for mobile scroll affordance */}
      <div className="flex overflow-x-auto hide-scrollbar relative w-full lg:w-auto mask-image-fade-right">
         {/* Nav links */}
      </div>
      {/* Add Sticky CTA (Hidden on small mobile to save space) */}
      <div className="hidden md:block pl-4">
         <a href="#demo" className="px-4 py-2 bg-[#F3922D] text-[#0F0F0F] rounded-full text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[#d67b22] transition-colors">
           Book Walkthrough →
         </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.7] Gate the "Email to Board" ROI Link
* **Description:** Turn the `mailto:` link into a 2-field lead capture modal.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 2 days
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo
* **Evidence:** Closer
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** `<p className="text-sm">Not ready to book? <a href="mailto:..." className="text-orange-500 italic underline">Email this ROI report to your board →</a></p>`
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <div className="py-4 mt-2 border-t border-gray-100 flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Not ready to book?</p>
    <button 
      onClick={() => setBoardModalOpen(true)}
      className="text-orange-600 font-semibold hover:text-orange-700 underline underline-offset-4 decoration-orange-200 hover:decoration-orange-500 transition-all text-base py-2 px-4"
    >
      Send these projected savings to your Board →
    </button>
    {/* Include BoardReportModal component here */}
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.8] Fix "Moat" Mobile Overlap
* **Description:** Rewrite the CSS logic for the right-column data pills so they stack vertically instead of overlapping text.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/MoatSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Mobile Legibility
* **Evidence:** Mobile Inspector, Architect
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Hardcoded 2-column horizontal flex/grid layout with scattered pills.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Desktop: Structured list. Mobile: Stacked col (grid-cols-1) */}
  <div className="bg-[#1B1814] rounded-2xl p-8 lg:p-12 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12">
    <div className="text-left">
      <h2 className="text-brand-orange text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase mb-2">Moat</h2>
      <h3 className="text-3xl font-serif font-bold text-white mb-4">We did the messy integration work so you don't have to.</h3>
      <p className="text-gray-300 max-w-[500px]">...</p>
    </div>
    {/* Stacked stats for balanced desktop alignment and perfect mobile wrapping */}
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 justify-center">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-6 bg-[#26231F] p-4 rounded-xl">
        <span className="font-mono text-orange-500 text-3xl font-bold">46</span>
        <p className="text-gray-300 text-sm">production tools in orchestration</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.9] Fix FAQ Accordion Interaction
* **Description:** Swap "X" close icon for a plus/minus and change CPU-bound height animations to Grid.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/FaqSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** UX / Performance
* **Evidence:** Architect, Closer, Speedster
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** Uses `<X className="..." />` for open state. All closed by default.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  const FaqItem = ({ question, answer, isOpen, onClick }) => (
    <div className="border-b border-gray-200 py-6">
      <button onClick={onClick} className="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-left">
        <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{question}</span>
        {isOpen ? <Minus className="text-orange-500" /> : <Plus className="text-gray-400" />}
      </button>
      {/* Use CSS Grid for performant animation instead of height transition */}
      <div className={`grid transition-all duration-300 ${isOpen ? 'grid-rows-[1fr] opacity-100 mt-4' : 'grid-rows-[0fr] opacity-0'}`}>
        <div className="overflow-hidden">
          <p className="text-gray-600">{answer}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
  ```

#### [2.10] Reorder Hero Layout for Mobile First
* **Description:** Ensure the CTA button sits above the bullet list on mobile screens.
* **File:** `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Mobile Conversion
* **Evidence:** Mobile Inspector, Closer
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-col">
    <p className="text-lg mb-8 max-w-2xl text-gray-800 leading-relaxed">
      In 30 minutes, we connect to your tee sheet...
    </p>
    
    {/* Move CTA above bullets using Flex order or direct DOM placement */}
    <div className="mb-10 md:mb-12">
      <button className="bg-[#F3922D] hover:bg-[#D97D22] text-[#1B1814] font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded transition-colors inline-flex items-center">
        Book My 30-Minute Walkthrough &rarr;
      </button>
      <p className="text-sm text-[#595959] mt-3">Free &middot; No credit card &middot; No IT lift</p>
    </div>
  
    <div className="mb-4">
      <h3 className="text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-[#F3922D] mb-4">What You'll Leave With</h3>
      <ul className="space-y-4">...</ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

#### [2.11] Dark Mode Premium Form Inputs
* **Description:** Restyle blinding `#FFFFFF` form inputs to translucent dark grey to preserve the premium aesthetic.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Design / Front-end
* **Effort:** 1 day
* **Impact:** Bounce Rate
* **Evidence:** Brand Guardian, Architect
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** White inputs. Sans-serif numbers. Generic blue icons.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Form Inputs */}
  <input className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#F3922D] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F3922D] rounded text-base px-4 py-2" />
  
  {/* SOC 2 Badge (Use Lucide icon in brand neutral/brass, not system blue) */}
  <div className="flex items-center text-xs text-gray-400">
    <ShieldCheck className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 mr-1" />
    <span>SOC 2 Type II (Audit Active)</span>
  </div>
  ```

---

### Sprint 3 – Structural (1-2 weeks each)

#### [3.1] Global Font Preloading (LCP Protection)
* **Description:** Prevent the 300-800ms text flash by injecting `rel="preload"` into the document head for Fraunces and Plus Jakarta Sans.
* **File:** `index.html` (or `src/App.jsx` Helmet)
* **Owner:** Engineering
* **Effort:** 2 days
* **Impact:** Core Web Vitals (LCP)
* **Evidence:** Speedster
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```html
  <head>
    <!-- Add inside <head> before stylesheets -->
    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/Fraunces-Variable.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin="anonymous">
    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/PlusJakartaSans-Variable.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin="anonymous">
  </head>
  ```

#### [3.2] Comparison Table Mobile Degradation
* **Description:** Wrap the 5-column competitor matrix in a responsive `snap-x` overflow container.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/ComparisonSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Front-end
* **Effort:** 3 days
* **Impact:** Usability
* **Evidence:** Architect, Mobile Inspector
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  // Wrap the table in a responsive overflow container for mobile
  <div className="w-full overflow-x-auto pb-4 snap-x hide-scrollbar">
    <div className="min-w-[800px]"> {/* Forces scroll on mobile instead of crushing text */}
      {/* Existing grid/table structure */}
    </div>
  </div>
  // Add a subtle mobile-only hint
  <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-2 text-center md:hidden">Swipe to compare →</p>
  ```

#### [3.3] Redesign ROI Chart to Build Analytical Trust
* **Description:** Replace the decorative "Dues Protected" graphic with an SVG/Recharts visualization featuring dynamic Y-axis data rendering.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Engineering / Design
* **Effort:** 1-2 weeks
* **Impact:** +$18k/mo
* **Evidence:** Architect, Skeptic
* **Before / After:**
  **Current state:** A generic ascending line with "Jan" and "Dec" labels.
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  <div className="relative h-64 w-full mt-8 border-l border-b border-gray-300 pt-4 pr-2">
    {/* Y-Axis Labels */}
    <div className="absolute -left-12 top-0 flex flex-col justify-between h-full text-xs text-gray-500 font-mono py-2">
      <span>$120k</span>
      <span>$60k</span>
      <span>$0</span>
    </div>
    {/* Dynamic SVG Line path dependent on slider state */}
    <svg className="w-full h-full overflow-visible" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none">
      <path 
         d={`M0,100 C40,90 60,${100 - (revenueRecovered / maxRevenue) * 100} 100,${100 - (revenueRecovered / maxRevenue) * 100}`} 
         fill="none" 
         stroke="#F3922D" 
         strokeWidth="3" 
         className="drop-shadow-md transition-all duration-300"
      />
    </svg>
  </div>
  ```

#### [3.4] Debounce ROI Sliders (Mobile INP)
* **Description:** Protect Interaction to Next Paint (INP) metric on mobile by debouncing React state updates on heavy calculator sliders.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Engineering
* **Effort:** 2 days
* **Impact:** Core Web Vitals (INP < 200ms)
* **Evidence:** Speedster
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
  import debounce from 'lodash.debounce';
  
  // Ensure the state update attached to the onChange event of the slider is debounced
  const handleSliderChange = useCallback(
    debounce((value, type) => {
      // update heavy graph state here
    }, 16), // ~60fps target
    []
  );
  ```

#### [3.5] Native Details & Image Compression (Contact Page)
* **Description:** Replace JS-heavy accordion with HTML5 `<details>` and convert heavy backgrounds to `AVIF`/`WebP`.
* **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
* **Owner:** Engineering
* **Effort:** 2 days
* **Impact:** Speedster (+6 pts)
* **Evidence:** Speedster, Brand Guardian
* **Before / After:**
  **New state:**
  ```jsx
  {/* Replace React state accordion with native HTML5 */}
  <details className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto border border-gray-200 rounded-lg bg-white overflow-hidden group">
    <summary className="font-semibold text-gray-800 p-4 cursor-pointer flex justify-between items-center outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#F3922D]">
      Data handling & security details
      <span className="transition group-open:rotate-90 text-[#F3922D]">▶</span>
    </summary>
    <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-100 text-sm text-gray-600 bg-gray-50">
      Your data is deleted within 30 days if you don't move forward. We utilize AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit.
    </div>
  </details>
  ```

#### [3.6] Offload Analytics to Web Worker
* **Description:** Move heavy third-party CRM/Analytics scripts (Hubspot, GTM) off the main thread to protect rendering speed.
* **File:** Architecture / Build setup
* **Owner:** Engineering
* **Effort:** 1-2 weeks
* **Impact:** INP / SEO
* **Evidence:** Speedster (Master Report)
* **Description:** Implement Partytown or Next.js/Vite Web Worker script offloading.

### Backlog – Strategic (Next Quarter)

| # | Task | Owner | Effort | Impact | Evidence |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **B.1** | **Mobile-Specific UI Image Crops:** Generate tighter, zoomed crops of intricate dashboard UI specifically for screens < 768px. | Design | 2 weeks | Mobile UX | Mobile Inspector |
| **B.2** | **"Before/After Board Meeting" Narrative:** Add visual narrative elements to the Platform page to frame the software in the emotional context of a GM reporting to their board. | Copy/Design | 2 weeks | Conviction | Storyteller |
| **B.3** | **Subset Font Files:** Use Pyftsubset to rip unused glyphs out of the Fraunces/Jakarta variable fonts, reducing payload weight for Latin-only users. | Engineering | 1 week | Performance | Speedster |
